basicInfo.name: Nightmare Rei
basicInfo.flavor: Rei never gives up on a hunt — you can try all you like, but she always gets her man. Her tenacity is the stuff of legend.

Normal Attack.desc:
Single Enemy
 - Deals damage equal to 100% of Physical Attack 1 time(s).
 - 100% chance to inflict Bleed [Duration: 2 Turn(s)]
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Increases Damage: To 100% of Physical Attack.

Skill 1.name: Swift Death
Skill 1.desc:
All Enemies
 - Deals damage equal to 47% of Physical Attack 2 time(s).
 - Each attack has a 100% chance to inflict Bleed. [Duration: 2 Turn(s)]
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Increases Damage: To 47% of Physical Attack.

Skill 2.name: Hail of Blades
Skill 2.desc:
All Enemies
 - Deals Piercing damage equal to 47% of Physical Attack 2 time(s).
 - Each attack has a 100% chance to inflict Bleed. [Duration: 2 Turn(s)]
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Increases Damage: To 47% of Physical Attack.

Passive.name: Hide
Passive.desc:
Self
 - Grants Camouflage. [Always Active]
 - Grants All Debuff Immunity. [Duration: 5 Turn(s)]
 - Grants Physical Attack Boost. [Duration: 2 Turn(s)]
 - All Allies
 - Grants Quintuple-Target Attack Resistance [Always Active]

profile.story:
A member of an elf clan that lived deep in the forest on Moonlit Isle, avoiding humans.
Initially, Rei's clan had been wary of humanity, but thanks to Shiroda, Ace's grandfather, they began to slowly engage with humans.
The elders believed that once Shiroda became the lord of Moonlit Isle, the elves' lives would improve significantly, so they assigned Rei to guard him in battle.
Tragically, as the war escalated, Shiroda fell. Burdened by the failure to protect him, Rei left Moonlit Isle and wandered the lands of Aisha.
Years later, upon hearing that Shiroda's descendants had become entangled in war again, Rei returned. Now, as the protector of Ace and Daisy, Rei is determined to fulfill her old mission.
